Academic/Administrative Working Scholarship

Dear students,

Application period for administrative/academic working scholarship has begun today. From the following link you can apply.

The last day for application is September 23!

https://stu-my.khas.edu.tr/forms/basvuru/aktif_burslu

Quick Search

Through this form, you can access news, announcements, faculties and departments, base scores, our academic staff and administrative personnel, and their internal phone numbers.
